info.name: PeakU ERP API
info.description:
PeakU ERP API - all 16 modules.

AUTH: run 'AUTH > Login (get JWT)' first; it stores {{access_token}}, which every other request uses via collection-level Bearer auth.

Modules: Organization, HR, System, Inventory, Procurement, Manufacturing, Quality, Finance, CRM, Sales, Talent, Payroll, Projects, Tax, Calendar, Analytics & AI.

request.description: Authenticates and stores {{access_token}} for all other requests.
